name: Millrose Properties, Inc.
business: Millrose purchases and develops residential land and sells finished homesites to homebuilders through option contracts with predetermined costs and takedown schedules; to a lesser extent, it also provides development loans secured by residential property. The company's largest counterparty is Lennar, and it also serves other homebuilders, including Lennar Related Ventures and Other Counterparties. Millrose is externally managed by Kennedy Lewis Land and Residential Advisors LLC.
sellsTo: Homebuilders (Lennar, Lennar Related Ventures, Other Counterparties)

exposures.sentence: Millrose purchases and develops residential land and sells finished homesites to homebuilders by way of option contracts with predetermined costs and takedown schedules.
